tools.description: Infrastructure dependency assessment — structured dependency review, continuity conditions, and export artifacts (PSA Toolbox edition). Own repo/workspace: clone or work in tools/dependency-analysis/.
Host V3 — separate product; own Git repository and folder. Populate tools/host-v3 by cloning your Host V3 repo (or submodule). Wire entryPath/externalUrl in this manifest when the web UI is ready.
